context: Tests whether the agent performs a structured review of a Rails engine, identifying isolation, namespacing, code quality, and gemspec completeness issues as prescribed by the rails-engine-reviewer skill.

checklist.name: isolate_namespace finding
checklist.description: The review identifies that isolate_namespace is missing from the engine, explains the impact (route/model conflicts with host app), and labels it Critical

checklist.name: Entry class naming finding
checklist.description: The review flags that Entry < ActiveRecord::Base is not namespaced under AuditLog::, which could conflict with other models in the host app

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal finding
checklist.description: The review notes that audit_log/entry.rb and audit_log.rb are missing # frozen_string_literal: true

checklist.name: gemspec completeness finding
checklist.description: The review identifies at least 3 missing gemspec fields: author/authors, license, required_ruby_version, and/or add_dependency for runtime deps

checklist.name: Two additional quality findings
checklist.description: The review includes at least 2 additional findings beyond the required ones (e.g. no tests, no YARD docs, metadata: record.attributes as a security concern, no versioning constant)

checklist.name: Severity labels applied
checklist.description: Each finding has a severity label: Critical, Warning, or Suggestion

checklist.name: Prioritized action plan
checklist.description: The review ends with a prioritized action plan listing fixes in order of severity

checklist.name: metadata security note
checklist.description: The review flags that storing record.attributes as metadata could expose sensitive fields and suggests filtering or serializing only safe attributes

checklist.name: English and professional tone
checklist.description: The review is written in English with a constructive, professional tone

checklist.name: No code changes made
checklist.description: The agent produces a review document only — it does not modify the engine files (fixes are left for the action plan)
